name: Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together sugar and margarine until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in pumpkin and water. Mix until combined.
4. Sift flour, baking soda, salt, and spices into a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, mixing until just combined.
6. Pour batter into greased and floured bread loaf pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 60-70 minutes in standard-sized loaf pans.
8. Cool completely before removing from pans.
9. This recipe freezes well. If making as a cake and freezing, frost after thawing on the day of serving.
Note: This is a versatile recipe. Mini loaf pans are great for portion control. For cakes, use 13x9 or 15x11 pans. Frost with cream cheese frosting before serving.
